title: Butane Gas Refill 16ml Mini Canister – Universal Fuel for Cigarette Lighters & Torch Lighters
features: High-Purity Butane for Clean Burning: Made with refined butane gas that delivers a clean, stable, and consistent flame. Produces minimal odor and residue, helping maintain lighter performance and efficiency over time.

Universal Refill Design: Engineered to be compatible with most standard cigarette lighters, torch lighters, and small butane-powered devices, making it a versatile and practical fuel solution for everyday use.
Compact & Portable 16ml Canister: Small, lightweight size allows easy storage in pockets, drawers, tool kits, or travel bags, ideal for home, outdoor, camping, and on-the-go use.
Leak-Resistant & Safe Refilling System: Designed with a precision valve to control gas flow during refilling, reducing leakage, fuel wastage, and ensuring safer handling.

Reliable Performance for Daily Needs: Provides dependable ignition and steady flame output, suitable for household tasks, outdoor activities, and professional environments where consistent fuel supply is essential.
Safety Features: The Clipper Gas Refill Bottle complies with safety standards to ensure a secure and reliable refilling process.
Multiple Refill Capability: The 16ml capacity allows several refills depending on device size, offering practical value despite its compact form.

Why to buy the 16ml Clipper Refill Bottle: The Clipper Gas Refill Bottle is a convenient and essential accessory for those who use -powered lighters, torches, or other fuelled devices. This refill bottle is designed to provide a clean and efficient way to replenish the fuel in your devices.
description: The Mini Butane Gas Refill 16ml is a compact, efficient, and dependable fuel solution designed to meet everyday household, outdoor, and professional needs. Manufactured using high-purity butane , it ensures a clean, stable, and consistent flame with minimal odor and residue. This results in smooth ignition performance and reliable operation across compatible butane-powered devices. Its universal compatibility makes it suitable for use with most standard cigarette lighters, torch lighters, and other small butane appliances. The precision-engineered valve system allows controlled gas release, helping to reduce leakage and fuel wastage while maintaining optimal pressure for efficient performance. The portable 16ml size is ideal for users who value convenience and mobility. Lightweight and easy to store, it fits comfortably in drawers, tool kits, travel bags, or emergency kits, making it a practical choice for home use, camping trips, outdoor activities, and professional environments. Despite its compact size, the canister delivers dependable fuel output for multiple refills, ensuring excellent value and usability. KEY FEATURES: High-Purity Butane Clean & Consistent Flame Universal Compatibility Portable 16ml Size Leak-Resistant Design Easy Refill System Lightweight & Compact Reliable Performance
